name: extaggerated
description: Extaggerated Obsidian plugin for AI-assisted native tagging and node note generation.

scripts.build: npm run build:js && npm run build:css
scripts.format: biome format --write package.json package-lock.json biome.json manifest.json tsconfig.json esbuild.config.mjs src
scripts.format:check: biome format package.json package-lock.json biome.json manifest.json tsconfig.json esbuild.config.mjs src

author: Felix Folkebrant
